ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance data entry */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the web service the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "response_status_3xx" INTEGER /* Number of 3xx response status codes */,
  "response_status_1xx" INTEGER /* Number of 1xx response status codes */,
  "response_status_4xx" INTEGER /* Number of 4xx response status codes */,
  "request_rate" REAL /* Request rate in requests per minute */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate of requests in requests per second */,
  "response_status_5xx" INTEGER /* Number of 5xx response status codes */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Average response time in milliseconds */,
  "response_status_2xx" INTEGER /* Number of 2xx response status codes */,
  "number_of_requests" INTEGER /* Total number of requests */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the request */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "http_method" TEXT /* HTTP method of the request */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint of the request */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if any */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the service */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES web_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "web_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each web service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the web service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the web service */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the web service is deployed (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the web service */,
  "service_version" TEXT /* Version of the web service */,
  "deploy_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the service was deployed */,
  "health_check_url" TEXT /* URL used for health checks */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the service was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, operations engineer, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES performance_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert rule */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web service the rule applies to */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Performance metric to monitor (e.g., response_time, request_rate) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the rule is currently active */,
  "trigger_condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency in minutes to check the condition */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Last time the alert was triggered */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the rule was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_rules_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES web_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert rule that was triggered */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance data that triggered the alert */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was resolved */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the alert (1 being highest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES performance_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES alert_rules ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the dashboard was modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the dashboard */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the dashboard (e.g., overview, detailed) */,
  "shared" INTEGER /* Whether the dashboard is shared with other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
